title: immersivecraft
description: This combines a lot of mods that make the game not only look immersive, but also feel immersive. The sound design, the movement, and the graphics are enhanced making the experience more immersive.
body: Immerse yourself in a world where you dont only see the immersion, but you feel the immersion. This modpack combines mods such as: Vanilla Refreshed, Animation overhaul, Camera Overhaul, Better Combat, First person model, leawind's third person, and so much more! Although beware, this might come for your pc. I would recommend at least a NVIDIA RTX 3060. But if you have a better one thats amazing!
